# GLKTextureInfoOrigin.unknown

**Case**

The origin of the texture is not supported.

## Declaration

```swift
case unknown
```

## Constants

- **GLKTextureInfoOrigin.topLeft**: The origin of the texture is in the top-left corner.
- **GLKTextureInfoOrigin.bottomLeft**: The origin of the texture is in the bottom-left corner.

items.description: The origin of the texture is in the top-left corner.
items.name: GLKTextureInfoOrigin.topLeft

items.description: The origin of the texture is in the bottom-left corner.
items.name: GLKTextureInfoOrigin.bottomLeft
